description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a sleeveless, dirty tank top and rugged blue cargo pants. The individual has visible dirt and grime on their clothing and skin, suggesting recent physical activity or exposure to harsh conditions. Their right forearm is wrapped in a bandage, and their arms are extended horizontally. The pants are loose-fitting and appear to be tied at the waist with a jacket or shirt. The person is wearing sturdy, lace-up boots suitable for urban or rough terrain. Their hair is short and curly, and their overall appearance suggests resilience and readiness for urban environments.
description: A rugged adult pedestrian in a sleeveless tank top, blue cargo pants, and boots, with a bandaged arm and short curly hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the person's face, sleeveless tank top, bandaged right forearm, and blue cargo pants tied at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bandaged right arm, and the loose fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the tank top, the tied garment at the waist, and the back of the boots and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the unbandaged left arm, the side profile of the pants, and the sturdy boots.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top and rugged cargo pants with a tied waist garment
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
